title: adonis aestivalis var. ochroleuca
intro: Adonis aestivalis var. ochroleuca, also known as the Yellow Pheasant's Eye, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Adonis aestivalis var. ochroleuca is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
